headline: The Long Collapse Century: September 11 Attacks

events.title: 2000 US Presidential Election
events.description: George W. Bush wins after Supreme Court halts Florida recount

events.title: Dot-Com Crash Aftermath
events.description: Greenspan cuts rates to 1%; loose monetary policy seeds housing bubble

events.title: September 11 Attacks
events.description: 1-2 flights hit targets; others intercepted or failed
events.explanation: Earlier FAA response or passenger awareness prevents full attack

events.title: China Joins WTO
events.description: China WTO accession delayed to 2006

events.title: Post-9/11 Security Architecture
events.description: Extreme security measures; internment discussions; massive civil liberties erosion

events.title: Opioid Crisis
events.description: Opioid epidemic kills 700K+ by 2030; fentanyl wave devastates

events.title: Columbia Shuttle Disaster
events.description: Shuttle destroyed on re-entry; program eventually ends

events.title: Iraq War Decision
events.description: US conducts air strikes against suspected WMD sites only
events.explanation: Congress refuses ground invasion authorization

events.title: Post-Genome Era
events.description: Open access to genetic data accelerates research worldwide

events.title: BRICS / Emerging Market Boom
events.description: Emerging market boom never materializes

events.title: Social Media Emergence
events.description: Ad-funded, engagement-maximizing platforms dominate

events.title: Drone Warfare Program
events.description: Drone warfare limited to active war zones

events.title: Record Hurricane Season
events.description: Fewer storms; FEMA not tested and remains complacent

events.title: Indian Ocean Tsunami
events.description: 230K dead across 14 countries; no warning system existed

events.title: Hurricane Katrina Response
events.description: FEMA fails catastrophically; 1,800+ die; New Orleans flooded for weeks

events.title: Katrina Racial Reckoning
events.description: Racial dimensions of Katrina ignored

events.title: Cloud Computing / AWS
events.description: AWS, Azure, GCP dominate; hyperscaler model wins

events.title: North Korea Nuclear

events.title: Smartphone Revolution
events.description: No dominant platform; feature phones persist longer

events.title: US Shale / Fracking Revolution
events.description: US becomes energy independent by 2019; largest oil and gas producer

events.title: Beijing Olympics

events.title: 2008 Financial Crisis

events.explanation: Fed acts more aggressively in March 2008

events.title: 2008 US Presidential Election
events.description: Barack Obama wins presidency; first Black president

events.title: Twitter Becomes Political Infrastructure
events.description: Aggressive content moderation from 2012 prevents weaponization of the platform
events.explanation: Twitter invests heavily in moderation; political manipulation is curtailed early

events.title: Haiti Earthquake
events.description: Massive earthquake devastates Haiti; international response widely criticized

events.title: Collapse of Local Journalism
events.description: 2,500+ newspapers close 2005-2030; news deserts cover a third of US counties

events.title: Deepwater Horizon Oil Spill
events.description: 4.9M barrels spilled; 87 days to cap the well

events.title: Euro Sovereign Debt Crisis
events.description: Euro collapses; multiple countries exit

events.title: SpaceX and Reusable Rocketry
events.description: SpaceX succeeds with Falcon 9; reusable rocketry slashes launch costs by 10x
events.explanation: Falcon 9 flies 2010, first landing 2015; opens commercial space era

events.title: Stuxnet / Cyber Warfare
events.description: Stuxnet never discovered; remains covert

events.title: WikiLeaks / Information Warfare

events.title: Arab Spring

events.title: Fukushima Nuclear Disaster
events.description: Three reactor meltdowns; global nuclear retreat

events.title: Libya Intervention
events.description: No Western intervention; Gaddafi suppresses revolt

events.title: Bin Laden Operation
events.description: Pakistan cooperates in joint operation; bin Laden captured alive and tried

events.title: US Debt Ceiling Crises
events.description: Repeated debt ceiling crises; brinkmanship becomes norm

events.title: Solar Cost Revolution
events.description: Non-Chinese solar manufacturing develops; slower but more resilient supply chain

events.title: Occupy Wall Street
events.description: Protests gain attention but produce no lasting institutional impact

events.title: Instagram / Visual Social Media
events.description: Platform redesigned to reduce social comparison and promote wellbeing
events.explanation: Hidden likes, reduced filters, and anti-comparison features become standard

events.title: YouTube Recommendation Radicalization
events.description: TikTok-style competitor emerges without the same radicalization dynamics
events.explanation: A short-form video competitor captures attention without rabbit-hole algorithms

events.title: ZIRP Era / Quantitative Easing
events.description: Rate hikes begin 2014; slower but more stable growth

events.title: Deep Learning / AlexNet Breakthrough
events.description: Deep learning + GPUs transform AI; massive investment follows

events.title: China — Xi Consolidation
events.description: China prioritizes economic liberalization over control

events.title: Sandy Hook / Gun Control
events.description: March For Our Lives energy happens six years earlier

events.title: Streaming and Media Fragmentation
events.description: PBS/BBC model scales; shared reference points and trusted journalism maintained
events.explanation: Public media investment grows; serves as common ground across political divides

events.title: Pope Francis Election
events.description: A doctrinally conservative pope is elected; no climate encyclical
events.explanation: Conclave selects a traditionalist European cardinal

events.title: Boston Marathon Bombing
events.description: Pressure cooker bombs at finish line; 3 dead, 264 injured

events.title: Post-Fukushima Nuclear Policy Shift
events.description: Germany phases out nuclear; Japan offline for years; global nuclear capacity stalls

events.title: Snowden Revelations
events.description: No major surveillance leak occurs

events.description: Venezuela muddles through without full collapse

events.title: Deaths of Despair / Life Expectancy

events.title: Gamergate / Online Harassment Weaponization
events.description: Harassment stays within gaming communities and does not spread to politics
events.explanation: Mainstream media ignores the controversy; tactics never gain wider adoption

events.title: BLM / Ferguson

events.title: Gain-of-Function Research Debate

events.title: Podcast Revolution (Serial)
events.description: Podcasts stay niche; talk radio remains the dominant long-form audio medium
events.explanation: Without smartphone ubiquity and app store distribution, podcasts never break through

events.title: Sony Pictures Hack
events.description: North Korea hacks Sony Pictures; data leaked, films stolen

events.title: Africa Development
events.description: Mixed development; some progress, persistent challenges

events.title: Antibiotic Resistance Escalation

events.title: Fake News as Industry

events.explanation: Automated fact-checking and media literacy campaigns outpace fake news proliferation

events.explanation: Turnout patterns slightly different; undecided break for status quo

events.title: Misinformation Epidemic

events.explanation: Content moderation at scale; fact-checking partnerships work

events.description: Steady battery cost decline; grid-scale storage viable by 2025

events.explanation: FEMA pre-positions resources; military deploys immediately

events.description: Global outrage but US maintains Saudi alliance; MBS faces limited consequences

events.description: He Jiankui imprisoned; informal moratorium on germline editing holds

events.title: Deepfake Technology Proliferation
events.description: Society adapts; video evidence loses legal weight

events.title: Content Moderation at Scale
events.description: Platforms try and mostly fail to moderate content at billion-post scale

events.title: WeWork / Unicorn Bubble

events.description: Quantum computing advances slowly; limited practical use by 2030

events.explanation: Visceral imagery of burning koalas shifts public opinion across nations

events.title: COVID-19 Emergence

events.title: European Green Deal

events.title: mRNA Vaccine Platform
events.description: mRNA used for COVID vaccines; other applications advance slowly

events.title: Digital Identity Infrastructure

events.title: Remote Work Revolution
events.description: Remote work triggers massive geographic redistribution

events.description: Fragmented global response; record vaccine development but unequal access

events.title: George Floyd / 2020 Racial Reckoning
events.description: COVID-19 lockdowns prevent mass gatherings; Floyd case remains local news
events.explanation: Pandemic restrictions and fatigue suppress protest mobilization

events.title: COVID Mental Health Crisis
events.description: Global mental health crisis; youth especially affected

events.title: TikTok / Algorithmic Media
events.description: TikTok dominates global short-form video

events.description: Significant learning loss; widened educational inequality

events.description: Biden wins with 306 electoral votes; record 81M votes

events.title: SolarWinds Cyber Espionage
events.description: Hack never discovered; ongoing espionage

events.title: January 6 Capitol Breach
events.description: Mob breaches Capitol; certification delayed but completed

events.description: Military coup; civil resistance; humanitarian crisis

events.description: Six-day blockage; $9B daily trade disruption; brief supply chain shock

events.title: Global Supply Chain Crisis
events.description: Supply chain disruptions persist through 2022

events.title: Colonial Pipeline Ransomware
events.description: Colonial Pipeline shut down by DarkSide ransomware; East Coast fuel crisis
